name: Squaw Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dry ingredients in a bowl.
2. Gradually add enough warm water to make soft dough.
3. Divide dough into two portions and turn out onto lightly floured surface.
4. Pat each portion into 8-inch circles about half an inch thick.
5. Cut into pie-shaped wedges.
6. Slit the center of each wedge.
7. Fry quickly in hot oil or fat, turning to ensure even cooking.
8. Drain on paper towels.
9. While still warm, dust with powdered sugar.
